description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a medium build, depicted in casual attire suitable for an urban environment. The person is wearing a sleeveless top and fitted pants, complemented by athletic shoes. The figure's arms are relaxed at the sides, and both wrists are adorned with wristbands or bracelets. The hairstyle is medium-length with visible volume and texture, styled in loose, layered waves. The overall appearance suggests a modern, active individual who might be encountered walking or standing on city sidewalks or in parks.
description: A casually dressed adult pedestrian with a sleeveless top, fitted pants, athletic shoes, and medium-length wavy hair, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sleeveless top, fitted pants, wristbands, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the figure, the volume of the hair, and the fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the top, pants, and the full hairstyle, as well as the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair texture, and relaxed stance.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and fitted pants with wristbands
